## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes.
- [ ] Ran the offline checks: `node bin/google-trends-now.mjs categories` and `npm pack --dry-run`.
- [ ] Added or updated tests for parser / formatter / CLI / fallback changes, with a fixture for parser regressions.
- [ ] Output fields stay backward compatible where possible.
- [ ] Stays within scope (Trending Now only — no Explore curves, browser automation, login, proxy rotation, or anti-bot bypass).
- [ ] Does not claim official Google support.
